job_statement: When planning to install or upgrade Builds, I want to understand version compatibility across components, so I can ensure my OpenShift cluster version is supported.
desired_outcomes: Verify GA vs TP status before deployment
evidence: release_notes-combined.adoc -> Lines 17-33: Compatibility and support matrix table
notes: Reference content showing version matrix for Operator, Shipwright, CLI, Pipelines, and OpenShift versions

job_statement: When evaluating whether to upgrade to Builds 1.5.1, I want to understand new features and capabilities, so I can decide if the release provides value for my use case.
desired_outcomes: Minimize time to evaluate release value
evidence: release_notes-combined.adoc -> Lines 35-44: New features section for 1.5.1
notes: FIPS compliance is the key feature in this release

job_statement: When deciding whether to upgrade to Builds 1.5.1, I want to know what bugs and security issues were fixed, so I can assess if the fixes address problems I'm experiencing.
desired_outcomes: Determine if upgrade resolves current issues
evidence: release_notes-combined.adoc -> Lines 46-51: Fixed issues including CRD volumes, x509 CVE, and disconnected cluster image pulls
notes: Includes CVE-2025-22874 fix and disconnected cluster improvements

job_statement: When evaluating whether to upgrade to Builds 1.5, I want to understand new features and capabilities, so I can decide if the release provides value for my use case.
desired_outcomes: Minimize time to evaluate release value
evidence: release_notes-combined.adoc -> Lines 53-76: New features including Shipwright 0.16, nodeSelector, scheduler-name, buildpacks strategies, git.depth parameter
notes: Buildpacks feature is Technology Preview only. Multiple CLI enhancements (nodeSelector, scheduler-name, git.depth)

job_statement: When deciding whether to upgrade to Builds 1.5, I want to know what bugs and security issues were fixed, so I can assess if the fixes address problems I'm experiencing.
desired_outcomes: Determine if upgrade resolves current issues
evidence: release_notes-combined.adoc -> Lines 78-81: Fixed issues with build controller permissions and reconciliation
notes: Security fix: build controller no longer has excessive CRD modification permissions

job_statement: When planning upgrades or new installations, I want to know which features or channels are deprecated, so I can avoid using unsupported options.
desired_outcomes: Minimize risk of using unsupported features
evidence: release_notes-combined.adoc -> Lines 83-87: builds-1.3 channel deprecated, use builds-1.5 instead
notes: Channel deprecation guidance - migrate from builds-1.3 to builds-1.5
